name: Thronglets
description: Bridges OpenClaw tool hooks to Thronglets sparse-signal decisions and trace recording.

binaryPath.label: Thronglets binary path
binaryPath.help: Path to the local thronglets executable.

dataDir.label: Thronglets data dir
dataDir.help: Optional shared data directory for traces and workspace state.

decisionTools.label: Decision tools
decisionTools.help: OpenClaw tool names that should consult Thronglets before execution.
